name: Yokoo
description: Yokoo is a 3rd year student at Kamome Gakuen's middle school. He is Minamoto Kou's friend and is usually seen together with Satou.

name: Yoriko Nikaidou
description: __Height:__ 155cm A dispatcher at Bokuto Station who later becomes a patrol officer and partner of Aoi Futaba, Yoriko is an incorrigible gossip who pokes her nose into everything that happens at the precinct. Unfortunately, she frequently misinterprets things she sees and hears about, resulting in embarrassment and complications. She keeps an especially close eye on Miyuki and Ken. Yoriko also enjoys heckling her colleagues, especially when she talks about anything supernatural or paranormal. Sh

name: Yoshifumi Aoki
description: Yoshifumi is Yui's classmate. He holds affection for her, and continues his attempts to approach her, but she never gives him a chance. In the Cultural Research Club he's often called out, and his pathetic side stands out more, but he also relaxes them with some of his casual statements.

description: Yuuri is the type of high school student who enjoys baseball more than textbooks. He was 'named' by Conrad when he mentioned to Yuri's mother how, where he comes from, Yuri means July.

name: Zoisite
description: Zoisite is the third of the Shitennou, and is second-lowest in rank. In the manga, His first mission was to locate the Ginzuishou and follows several leads through news reports and press releases, but eventually switched his tactics to gathering energy instead. He is almost always shown with [Kunzite](https://anilist.co/character/8515/Kunzite). Zoisite is able to use pryokinesis, levitation, and teleportation. He is also able to conjure up shards of ice/crystal. In various Sailor Moon dubs, Zois

name: Ai Mikami
description: ~!Originally assumed to be two separate Diary users, Marco and Ai are in fact both the Seventh Diary user. Ai appeared early in the series working undercover as member of the Onukata cult with her friend Orin Miyashiro to spy on Tsubaki. She returns later, this time with her boyfriend, Marco to eliminate the threat that is Yuki and Yuno. When first introduced, Marco and Ai were using apprentice diaries which were assume by Yuki and his allies as their real Future diaries with Marco's The Unbeata

name: Asaemon Ikeda
description: **Race**: Human **Affiliation**: Ikeda clan She was the 17th Ikeda Yaemon of the Ikeda Clan, and the adopted daughter of 16th Yaemon, as well as the adoptive sister of the 18th Ikeda Yaemon. She was branded as a traitor by the clan after she killed the 16th Yaemon. ~!Later on, it is revealed that her adoptive brother planned to sell her to the Hitotsubashi faction. When he is killed by Gintoki and Asaemon together, she succeeds him by taking up the title of the 19th Ikeda Yaemon.!~

name: Asuka Mishima
description: __Birthplace:__ Fukushima __Height:__ 157 cm Asuka Mishima is Haruto's classmate. She is also a friend and neighbor of Haruto's older sister, Aoi. She enters Haruto's life after mistaking him for a burglar and subduing him with a baseball bat.

name: Atsuya Fubuki
description: Fubuki Shirou's younger brother who died in a snow sliding. His personality grew on Shirou's body and he can alternate between both, being an ace striker or a great defender. His hissatsu technique is Eternal Blizzard.

name: Aya Koda
description: She is a civilian who assists Kunikida with a case.

name: Ayako Mitsuzuri
description: __Height:__ 162 cm A stellar athlete, and captain of the archery dojo. Ayako and Rin are actively competing to see who will be the first to snag a boyfriend. Ayako often asks Shirou to come to the archery dojo and watch them practice. ~! She is victimized by Rider or Caster early in the story and is later found unconscious in an alleyway. name: Barbara
description: Barbara is a Shadow living in the mansion and under the care of the "Living Doll", Barbie. She's also the leader of the Star-Bearers, in charge of children's building. **Manga Spoiler:** ~! She later resigned from her post in Star-Bearer and gave it to Kate. !~

name: Benio Hanamura
description: The haikara of the title is Benio Hanamura, a 17-year-old schoolgirl in Tokyo circa 1920 (during the Taishō era). Benio lost her mother when she was very young and has been raised by her father, a high-ranking official in the Japanese army. description: Eureka is the younger sister of Citron in the anime and one of Satoshi's traveling companions. (Source: Pokemon Wiki)

name: Flora
description: **Race:** Vampire Flora is a skilled witch who arrived at Hiraku 's house searching for Loo . She is also a researcher interested in fermentation, which led her to move to the village.
